title: coreopsis bidentoides
intro: Coreopsis bidentoides, also known as tickseed, is a perennial wildflower native to North America, characterized by its bright yellow flowers and distinctive seed pods. The plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which are attributed to its high concentration of flavonoids and saponins. The health benefits of Coreopsis bidentoides include reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, as well as possessing antimicrobial and antiviral properties. Coreopsis bidentoides can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, making it a popular ingredient in natural remedies and holistic health practices.
